We use cookies to improve your experience. You can manage your preferences at any time.

The World's Fastest & Cheapest
Google Search API

Experience unparalleled speed with our industry-leading SERP API, delivering lightning-fast Google search results in 1-2 seconds, at an unbeatable price.

No credit card required

🇺🇸
en

    {
      "question": "How do I get Google to search?",
      "snippet": "Navigate to google.com and type your query into the search box. Then, hit\nsearch. You can filter your results by web page, image, shopping, videos, etc.",
      "title": "3 Ways to Search Google - wikiHow",
      "link": "https://www.wikihow.com/Search-Google"
    },
    {
      "question": "Can you find out if you have been Googled?",
      "snippet": "The most popular site is Google Alerts, but there are others like Mention.com\nthat you can use if you prefer. Google Alerts will prompt you to enter your name\nand any other words relevant to your reputation. You can also enter your name\nand keywords into our free privacy scan on our website.",
      "title": "How can I know if someone searched my name on Google? - Reputation.ca",
      "link": "https://www.reputation.ca/how-can-i-know-if-someone-searched-my-name-on-google/"
    }
  ],

    },
    {
      "title": "Draw Useful Data From Search Results With the Serpstack API",
      "link": "https://www.makeuseof.com/tag/serpstack-api/",
      "snippet": "What serpstack does, in a nutshell, is search for a query, then scrape the results page. Using the serpstack API, you can then use that data in...",
      "date": "53 months ago",
      "source": "MakeUseOf",
      "imageUrl": "https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcQu2Xq1X2LrTLnDq-I0RqctzE5hzPOl4CvKLN7DnqEdmH1vzWE7mkQhm2QmTQ&s",
      "position": 8
    },
    {
      "title": "SERPStack - Free, Real-Time Google Search API",
      "link": "https://designmodo.com/serpstack/",
      "snippet": "What is SERPStack? ... SERPStack is a scraping tool that promises to provide accurate search results in real-time. The tool mainly targets Google...",
      "date": "54 months ago",
      "source": "Designmodo",
      "imageUrl": "https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcSBnEZkTsNrX2Bxqa8hbLt72aYTjbengMGFtKveawukAvVIdcJvym_Uu5t6iA&s",
      "position": 9
    },

{
  "videos": [
    {
      "title": "SpaceX Falcon 9 Launches Starlink 6-55",
      "link": "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2ag4dKkL-pM",
      "snippet": "SpaceX launch of a batch of Starlink v2-mini satellites for their second generation high-speed Low Earth Orbit internet satellite ...",
      "imageUrl": "https://i.ytimg.com/vi/2ag4dKkL-pM/mqdefault.jpg?sqp=-oaymwEFCJQBEFM&rs=AMzJL3ntPBjBP56_vFqYBjVaK6yMSTO2iw",
      "duration": "2:22:33",
      "source": "YouTube",
      "channel": "NASASpaceflight",
      "date": "1 day ago",
      "position": 1
    },
    {
      "title": "Watch live: SpaceX Falcon 9 rocket Launches Earth observing ...",
      "link": "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_BghEK_4U2A",
      "snippet": "Watch live coverage as SpaceX launches a Falcon 9 rocket carrying the WorldView Legion 1 & 2 Earth observation satellites for Maxar.",
      "imageUrl": "https://i.ytimg.com/vi/_BghEK_4U2A/mqdefault.jpg?sqp=-oaymwEFCJQBEFM&rs=AMzJL3nhgDilGIRCjsN7cSNsMgqarc4hWg",
      "duration": "46:20",
      "source": "YouTube",
      "channel": "Spaceflight Now",
      "date": "1 day ago",
      "position": 2
    },

{
  "organic": [
    {
      "title": "Attention is all you need",
      "link": "https://proceedings.neurips.cc/paper/7181-attention-is-all",
      "publicationInfo": "A Vaswani, N Shazeer, N Parmar… - Advances in neural …, 2017 - proceedings.neurips.cc",
      "snippet": "… to attend to all positions in the decoder up to and including that position. We need to prevent",
      "year": 2017,
      "citedBy": 119097
    },
    {
      "title": "Attention is all you need",
      "link": "http://www.aiotlab.org/teaching/intro2ai/slides/10_attention_n_bert.pdf",
      "publicationInfo": "…, J Uszkoreit, L Jones, A Gomez, L Kaiser, I Polosukhin - NIPS, 2017 - aiotlab.org",
      "snippet": "… Attention • Visual attention and textual attention … Could we build a transformer-based",
      "year": 2017,
      "citedBy": 2326
    },
    {

    {
      "title": "Query refinement in a browser toolbar",
      "snippet": "202 with a toolbar 204 that suggests a refined search query 206 to a user in accordance with one embodiment. Simple, Affordable Pricing

Experience the industry's lowest prices with our Google SERP API's top-up model. No monthly subscriptions; simply pay for the credits you need. The more you order, the lower the cost per query. Enjoy prices up to 10 times cheaper than competitors such as SerpAPI and Bright Data.

FAQ

In general, all queries are returned in 1 to 2 seconds. Sometimes an individual request can take longer (2-4s) when we have to retry submitting it to Google. We are monitoring the response times closely.

Our default rate limit for the Ultimate credits is 300 queries per second. This allows you to perform approximately 15,000 to 18,000 searches in 1 minute. If your specific use case requires a higher concurrency we are able to change this limit.

Yes, whenever you call our API we directly query Google for the latest results. We do not cache anything so the returned response will reflect the latest SERP results of Google.

Yes, you are able to set the search location by specifying the country and language.

Every time you receive successful responses to queries, we will deduct credits from your account balance. When your credit balance reaches zero, we will stop accepting new queries.

We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover) and PayPal.

We offer a full refund within 7 days of your initial credit purchase unless you have used more than 20% of your credits.

Ready to build?

Unleash the potential of Google Search with our high-performance SERP API. Empower your next AI chatbot, SEO analytics, and fintech projects with lightning-fast access to real-time search results.

The world's fastest and cheapest Google Search API.
